projects.description: A brutal climbing challenge — scale an impossible mountain with nothing but a hammer, and try not to slide all the way back down.
Collect and combine the internet's favourite brainrots, grow your base, and out-produce everyone else on the server.

projects.role: Checkpoint system, animations + additional bugfixes & features
projects.description: A glitch-based difficulty-chart obby that ramps up stage by stage — only a small percentage of players ever finish it.

fallback.name: Star's Glitch Per Difficulty Chart Obby

projects.role: Handled marketplace features, some animations + additional features
projects.description: A difficulty-chart obby with every stage tested and your progress auto-saved as you climb.

projects.description: Sneak into rival bases, steal their prized units, and defend your own in a fast-paced steal-and-run.

projects.role: Scripted the entire game (with a partner)
projects.description: Spin for a shot at rare rewards, climb the ranks, and gamble your way to the top of the leaderboard.
Stack, balance and defend an ever-growing tower of brainrots against everything the game throws at it.
